news.title:
Crompton Greaves saw an NSE block trade of 645,724 shares at Rs. 256.2.
The total transaction value amounted to Rs. 16.54 crore.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves saw an NSE block trade of 645,724 shares at Rs. 256.2.
The total transaction value amounted to Rs. 16.54 crore.

news.title:
Delhi HC grants Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals interim injunction against trademark infringement.
Court highlights Crompton's immense popularity, high product standards, and media visibility.
news.summary:
Delhi HC grants Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals interim injunction against trademark infringement.
Court highlights Crompton's immense popularity, high product standards, and media visibility.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer faces Rs 426 Cr tax demand for AY 2024-25.
Demand includes Rs 345 Cr tax, Rs 81 Cr interest; company plans to appeal.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer faces Rs 426 Cr tax demand for AY 2024-25.
Demand includes Rs 345 Cr tax, Rs 81 Cr interest; company plans to appeal.

news.title:
Kotak Securities' Amol Athawale recommends Vedanta, Crompton Greaves, and Canara Bank for short-term gains with specific targets and stop losses.
Vedanta targets ₹720, Crompton ₹260, and Canara Bank ₹147, supported by technical patterns and bullish momentum signals.
news.summary:
Kotak Securities' Amol Athawale recommends Vedanta, Crompton Greaves, and Canara Bank for short-term gains with specific targets and stop losses.
Vedanta targets ₹720, Crompton ₹260, and Canara Bank ₹147, supported by technical patterns and bullish momentum signals.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals reports rising demand for induction and electric cookers.
The company plans to increase prices to sustain revenue margins.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals reports rising demand for induction and electric cookers.
The company plans to increase prices to sustain revenue margins.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals' credit rating affirmed by India Ratings & Research.
Bank loan facilities rated IND AA (Stable) and IND A1 for Rs. 9,750 crore.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals' credit rating affirmed by India Ratings & Research.
Bank loan facilities rated IND AA (Stable) and IND A1 for Rs. 9,750 crore.

news.title:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.
news.summary:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.

news.title:
Crompton launched residential wires, entering a ₹36-37K cr market; Q3 revenue ₹1,898 cr, EBITDA up 18.5% QoQ.
7% YoY revenue growth driven by ECD, Lighting; Butterfly revenue ₹245 cr, net profit up 44% YoY.
news.summary:
Crompton launched residential wires, entering a ₹36-37K cr market; Q3 revenue ₹1,898 cr, EBITDA up 18.5% QoQ.
7% YoY revenue growth driven by ECD, Lighting; Butterfly revenue ₹245 cr, net profit up 44% YoY.

news.title: Crompton anticipates major consumer categories to grow 10-15% for 2-3 years.
news.summary: Crompton anticipates major consumer categories to grow 10-15% for 2-3 years.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.96B from ₹1.8B YoY.
EBITDA margin slightly declined to 10.3% from 10.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.96B from ₹1.8B YoY.
EBITDA margin slightly declined to 10.3% from 10.5% YoY.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd schedules analyst/investor meets in Feb 2026.
Meetings include Nuvama, IIFL, Kotak events; no price-sensitive info to be shared.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd schedules analyst/investor meets in Feb 2026.
Meetings include Nuvama, IIFL, Kotak events; no price-sensitive info to be shared.

news.title:
CRISIL assigned 'AA/Stable' for Crompton Greaves' Rs. 975 crore long-term loans.
CRISIL withdrew 'AA/Stable' for Rs. 300 crore NCDs; short-term loans rated 'A1'.
news.summary:
CRISIL assigned 'AA/Stable' for Crompton Greaves' Rs. 975 crore long-term loans.
CRISIL withdrew 'AA/Stable' for Rs. 300 crore NCDs; short-term loans rated 'A1'.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 6, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST.
Company leaders, including MD & CFO, will present via Zoom; registration required.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 6, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST.
Company leaders, including MD & CFO, will present via Zoom; registration required.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals received a tax demand order of INR 57,187 for Apr 2021-Mar 2022.
The demand includes INR 28,370 tax, INR 18,817 interest, and INR 10,000 penalty; company plans to appeal.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals received a tax demand order of INR 57,187 for Apr 2021-Mar 2022.
The demand includes INR 28,370 tax, INR 18,817 interest, and INR 10,000 penalty; company plans to appeal.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves received an INR 46.2 Cr order from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. for 2,000 solar water pumping systems.
The order under the PM KUSUM scheme will be executed within 60 days; no related party transactions involved.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves received an INR 46.2 Cr order from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. for 2,000 solar water pumping systems.
The order under the PM KUSUM scheme will be executed within 60 days; no related party transactions involved.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves received a 20-year patent for energy-efficient cooling tech, valid from Mar 16, 2021.
The patent, covering ceiling fans and ACs, was granted on Dec 19, 2025, with number 576195.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves received a 20-year patent for energy-efficient cooling tech, valid from Mar 16, 2021.
The patent, covering ceiling fans and ACs, was granted on Dec 19, 2025, with number 576195.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on Crompton with a target price of ₹350.
The brokerage anticipates a 40% upside potential, as reported by CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on Crompton with a target price of ₹350.

news.title: Crompton gains nearly 4% after MOSL initiates a buy rating.
news.summary: Crompton gains nearly 4% after MOSL initiates a buy rating.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves faces a tax demand of INR 1.5L for FY 2021-22 by Ernakulam Division.
The demand includes tax INR 78.8K, interest INR 51.7K, penalty INR 20K; company plans to appeal.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves faces a tax demand of INR 1.5L for FY 2021-22 by Ernakulam Division.
The demand includes tax INR 78.8K, interest INR 51.7K, penalty INR 20K; company plans to appeal.

news.title:
Crompton Greaves Consumer wins EPC contract from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution for solar water pumping systems.
The project under PM KUSUM scheme involves completion within 60 days from NTP.
news.summary:
Crompton Greaves Consumer wins EPC contract from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution for solar water pumping systems.
